WARNING: A2338 is MBP 13" M1 (820-02020). No MagSafe. USB-C only. Has DFR + fan. Different PMU from MBA M2.

scenarios.range: No power or abnormal current at initial 5V USB-C connection
scenarios.meaning: Board draws no or abnormal current at initial 5V. Charger input path, CD3217, or charger IC fault.

steps.action: Check USB-C connector and CC lines
steps.measure: Inspect both USB-C connectors (page 59). Diode mode on CC1/CC2 pins.
steps.if_missing: Damaged connector → replace. If both fail, suspect SoC or CD3217 damage.

steps.measure: PP3V3_S2_UPC at CF400/CF500, PP1V25_S2 at CF402/CF502, PP1V8_S2 at UF400/UF500 VIN
steps.expected: PP3V3_S2_UPC = 3.3V, PP1V25_S2 = 1.25V (both need PMU running first)
steps.if_missing: No power to CD3217 → check upstream: PPBUS_AON → PP3V8_AON → PMU rails.
FF201 blown → replace fuse. If intact but no voltage → CD3217 internal MOSFET not passing VBUS.

steps.measure: Input at U5200, CHGR_AUX_OK (page 23), CHGR_EN_MVR, PPBUS_AON output
steps.if_missing: U5200 not switching → check gate drivers (PP5231-PP5228, page 22). Check SYS_DETECT (J5150).

steps.measure: SYS_DETECT_L (page 21), Q5155 (NTS4C569N), S5190/S5191 STO switches, R5156 pull-up to PP3V8_AON
steps.expected: SYS_DETECT_L pulled low when battery detected
steps.if_missing: Battery flex not making contact, or J5150 solder joints cracked (flex SOLDERED to MLB).
